The '''Clan Groogrun vibro-ax''' was a model of crude [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-ax]] manufactured by [[Snogrutt]], a master weaponsmith from Clan [[Groogrun]].

==Description==
The vibro-axs were crude weapons, made by the weaponsmith [[Snogrutt]] of the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Groogrun]] clan. The shaft of the vibro-ax was constructed of [[Wood/Legends|wood]], topped by a hollowed [[Axe/Legends|axe]] head that contained the weapon's [[Ultrasonic generator/Legends|ultrasonic generator]] and [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]]. The generator allowed the axe head to vibrate thousands of times a [[Standard second|second]], making it more deadly than an unpowered axe. Due to this design, the ultrasonic generator transferred a significant amount of vibration, making them difficult to wield in combat for [[Species/Legends|species]] without great strength such as Gamorreans.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
The nine Gamorrean guards who served [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] as [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]] insisted on arming themselves with Clan Groogun vibro-axs despite better weapons being available. The guards would often use the vibro-axs unpowered in an effort to demonstrate their strength, although many in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] believed they simply forgot to turn them on before combat in their excitement for battle.<ref name="EGWT" />

The vibro-axes were used to little effect when fighting [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] during the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]], as the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] effortlessly cut through their axes.
